notes: Official Goldfinch website. Primary starting source for Goldfinch ecosystem identity, product links, docs, legal pages, governance, GitHub, and market-data links.
Official Goldfinch docs. Supports Goldfinch Prime/product context and private-credit positioning. Used carefully as related context for GFI token classification.
Official Goldfinch X account. Use only for current announcements or links back to official documentation; not used for legal, reserve, or numeric production fields.
Etherscan token page for GFI on Ethereum. Supports contract address, token standard, verified source-code status, transfers, holders, and token market panel.
Etherscan identifies the token contract as an Ethereum ERC-20 token.
Etherscan shows verified source code for the token contract page. No Etherscan-submitted contract security audit was identified during this review.
Official Goldfinch monorepo. Use for deeper protocol-code and smart-contract architecture review. Not a substitute for a formal third-party audit report.

value: GFI is not a direct reserve-backed or redeemable private-credit asset; Goldfinch Prime product-level private-credit exposure should be modeled separately from GFI token backing.
notes: Official FAQ supports Goldfinch Prime product structure and private-credit exposure context. It does not establish native reserve backing or redemption rights for GFI token.
No onchain proof-of-reserves oracle, reserve attestation page, or reserve account evidence was identified for GFI token during this review.

value: GFI is treated as a protocol token; Goldfinch Prime / Heron note structure is product-level context only.
notes: Official FAQ references Goldfinch Prime product mechanics and Heron-related note context. Do not assign product-level structure directly to GFI token issuer/legal structure.
Official governance forum. Supports governance and protocol decision-making context.
Heron Finance is relevant to Goldfinch Prime product context. Regulator status must be verified through SEC IAPD/EDGAR before production grading.
Required regulator verification source for Heron Finance / Warbler Labs adviser status. Direct firm result was not confirmed in this pass; keep as data gap until manually verified.
Required SEC filing search for Goldfinch, Warbler Labs, Goldfinch Technology Company, Heron Finance, Heron entities, and note issuers. No direct GFI filing confirmed in this pass.

value: No official evidence found for native GFI token KYC transfer gating or whitelist transfer restrictions during this review.
notes: Compliance fields distinguish GFI token transferability from Goldfinch Prime product eligibility.
Official FAQ says Goldfinch Prime participation requires KYC and excludes specific unsupported countries. Stored as product-level context only, not native GFI token transfer compliance.
Official Goldfinch Prime terms page. Relevant to Goldfinch Prime product compliance, not direct GFI token legal opinion. Access or content may vary by jurisdiction.
Official legacy app terms. Supports historical app/legal context only.
CoinGecko used as primary token-market source for price snapshot. Volatile value; refresh before production import.
CoinGecko market cap snapshot. Cross-check differs from CoinMarketCap; keep conflict note in market layer.
CoinGecko 24h volume snapshot. Volatile and should be refreshed.
CoinGecko circulating supply snapshot. Cross-check with CoinMarketCap and Etherscan before production.
CoinGecko total supply snapshot, aligned approximately with Etherscan max total supply panel.
DeFiLlama protocol-level TVL source. Must not be interpreted as GFI token backing, reserve value, or direct AUM unless methodology is defined.
Etherscan holder count snapshot. Requires holder concentration analysis before risk scoring.
CoinMarketCap used as secondary cross-check for market cap, volume, supply, and approximate holder data. Values conflict with CoinGecko; use conflict notes.
No official native GFI token yield mechanism was verified. Goldfinch Prime or protocol pool returns are product-level context and should not be imported as GFI token yield.
Official FAQ describes Goldfinch Prime returns and fees. Store as product context only; do not use for native GFI token yield.
DeFiLlama may provide protocol/pool-level yield context. Do not map to GFI token currentYield unless Nexus models the underlying Goldfinch product/pool separately.
DeFiLlama GFI liquidity snapshot. Used for liquidity layer with conservative scoring. Refresh before production grading.
DeFiLlama identifies Uniswap V3 liquidity context. Specific pair URL should be captured from GeckoTerminal or DEXScreener before production.

value: CEX volume 136455; DEX volume 1596; total GFI volume 138115
notes: DeFiLlama volume snapshot shows trading activity mostly through CEX venues, with modest DEX volume. Refresh before production.

value: Quarterly product-level withdrawals; not native GFI redemption liquidity
notes: Official FAQ product-level withdrawal mechanics are relevant for Goldfinch Prime, but they do not create GFI token redemption rights.
Use GeckoTerminal or similar DEX analytics to capture exact pool URL, liquidity depth, volume, and bid/price-impact context before production scoring.

value: Research-grade pending legal, regulatory, audit, holder concentration, and liquidity-depth verification.
notes: Risk layer should remain conservative because GFI is not a direct reserve-backed asset and several production-grade evidence items remain missing.
